feedback.text: In recent week/s there was another disturbing practice by Visa/Mastercard/Paypal that are trying to remove service for adult games and are basically enforcing censorship. They are forcing a huge company like Steam (and others) to remove games they deem to damage the brand by removing their services. This should be unacceptable for EU standards as we give far too much power to payment processors. They are basically having huge amount of power that companies should not hold. Companies should not be able to dictate who they offer services to, especially if they are managing an important sector as it is payments. EU has fined google multiple times for monopoly practices, i guess its about time we start doing the same for payment processors. I urge EU to do something as this is getting out of hand.
